heading: Arrawarra vs Arrawarra Headland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Arrawarra, New South Wales and Arrawarra Headland, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Arrawarra Headland has a lower overall climate risk score (46/100) compared to Arrawarra (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Arrawarra or Arrawarra Headland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Arrawarra has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Arrawarra Headland scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Arrawarra scores 54/100 for bushfire risk. Arrawarra Headland scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Arrawarra or Arrawarra Headland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Arrawarra Headland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
